title: RPSC Rajasthan Police Sub Inspector Telecom PET Result 2026
short_information: Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has released the advertisement of Advt. No. 20/2024-25 for Sub Inspector (Telecom) Comp. Exam 2024 Recruitment. Those Candidates Are Interested with Vacancy Can Download Result. For other information related to Rajasthan Police Sub Inspector Telecom Exam 2024 recruitment like syllabus, age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply. Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) Rajasthan Police Sub Inspector (SI Telecom) Recruitment 2024 RPSC SI Telecom Exam Advt No. : 20/2024 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / Other State : 600/- OBC / BC : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Cash at Rajasthan E Mitra Portal or Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking From 19 April 2023 onwards only one time fee will be charged for all the exams of Rajasthan Rajasthan Sub Inspector Telecom
eligibility: Advt. No. 20/2024-25 for Sub Inspector (Telecom) Comp. Exam 2024 98 Bachelor Degree in Science B.SC with Physics & Mathematics OR BE / B.Tech Degree in Telecommunications / Electronics / Electrical Engineering. Knowledge of Rajasthani Culture. More Details Read the Notification. RPSC Sub Inspector Telecom Jobs 2024 : Category Wise

tables.table_name: Rajasthan Sub Inspector Telecom Notification 2024: Age Limit as on 01/01/2025 Minimum Age : 20 Years Maximum Age : 25 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC Advt. No. 20/2024-25 for Sub Inspector (Telecom) Comp. Exam 2024 Recruitment Rules.

text_sections.section: How to Fill Rajasthan Police Sub Inspector Telecom Exam Online Form 2024
text_sections.content: Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC Advt. No. 20/2024-25 for Sub Inspector (Telecom) Comp. Exam 2024 Recruitment 2024, Candidate Can Apply Between 28/11/2024 to 27/12/2024. | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Vacancies Application Form in Govt. Jobs of RPSC SI Telecom Advt. 20/2024-25 for SI Telecom 2024 Latest Govt. Recruitment Online Form 2024 | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Columns Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If you have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
